title: Craftable Nametag Recipe
body:
# Craftable Nametag Recipe

**Craftable Name Tag: Stop Fishing. Start Tagging. **

Let’s be real — Name Tags are annoying to get. You either fish for hours, trade with stingy villagers, or hope for dungeon loot. This datapack skips all that. Just craft the dang thing and get on with your life.

Note: “Name Tag Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack.If you are interested in more Datapacks check out the links at the end of the description.

**🧠 Why It’s Better:**

Because naming your dog shouldn’t feel like a side quest. Whether you're labeling mobs, customizing gear, or pulling Dinnerbone shenanigans, this pack gives you instant access to the one item Mojang made way too rare.

**📦 How to Use:**

1. Download the .zip
 
2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder
 
3. Type /reload in-game
 
4. Craft your Name Tag and start slapping names on everything
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
